name: Cle Indoor Golf
about: West Bank Golf Club is an indoor golf simulator venue and sports bar located in Downtown Cleveland. Founded in 2022, it combines a realistic golf experience with a relaxing entertainment environment. The facility features golf bays equipped with advanced simulators for year-round play and is open for both hourly rentals and private events. West Bank also offers membership packages for dedicated golfers and operates as a full-service sports lounge with an extensive drink menu, making it a unique destination for combining golf with social activities.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology provides instant feedback on club face and ball strike
Combines realistic golf simulation with a relaxed sports bar atmosphere
Convenient downtown Cleveland location in the Flats district
Offers flexible hourly rentals and membership options
Available for private events and corporate bookings

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; may allow outside food or have limited options not specified
Full bar with extensive drink selection

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify club rental options, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food service is mentioned, so outside food may be allowed, but alcohol appears to be provided by their full bar.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact timeframes for 18 holes, but standard simulator golf typically takes 1.5-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendliness is mentioned, though some reviews mention it as good for date nights and groups.
